title: Valley: Balance
body:

## Balances the mods from Valley!
- Waystone
- CTOV
- Expanded Storage
- Moog's Voyager Structures
- Moog's Nether Structures
- Structory: Towers
- Voyager Structures
- Numismatic Overhaul
- Vanilla Refresh
